cmd: nix develop --command bazel test --config=dev //tests/contracts/... && nix develop --command bazel test --config=release //tests/contracts:build_test
desc: Run the complete dev contract suite and the Bazel-generated embedded build-facts test under the real release configuration.

history.note: Verifier c-06 found BUILD-FR-009 had no real release-config build-facts exercise; retain V1 and add the missing release facts target.
